QuoteResponse.description:
Latest quote/LTP snapshot from the data lake (OHLCV-derived).

``bid`` / ``ask`` / ``bid_qty`` / ``ask_qty`` are live-only fields.
Historical lake quotes never populate them — use ``GET /api/v1/live/depth/{symbol}``
for Level-2 book. They remain optional so OpenAPI stays honest.

get.description:
Get technical indicator values for a symbol.

Queries DuckDB feature views:
- atr: v_feature_atr
- vwap: v_feature_vwap
- momentum: v_feature_momentum
- volume: v_feature_volume

Note: RSI is now computed by the Python Wilder's RSI implementation
(domain/indicators/rsi.py), not by SQL views.

parameters.description: Indicator type (atr, vwap, rsi, momentum, volume)
parameters.name: type

schema.description: Indicator type (atr, vwap, rsi, momentum, volume)
schema.title: Type

get.description:
Get market breadth indicators (advances/declines, TRIN, McClellan).

Uses real BreadthAnalytics to compute market breadth from
intraday snapshot data.

Get relative strength rankings.

Uses real RankingEngine to compute composite scores
and rank symbols by relative strength.
List registered strategy names.

post.description:
Run a backtest with the specified parameters.

Default path routes fills through the OMS (PARITY). Set ``research_only=true``
for fast PURE_SIM research without live-execution parity guarantees.

Sync every registered symbol up to today (federated, quota-aware).

``repair_scope``: ``tail`` (default, fast daily), ``internal`` (gap backfill),
or ``all`` (both). Runs in the background — poll ``GET /sync/status``.

Returns 503 if any critical gate is unavailable.

get.description:
Get historical OHLCV candles from the data lake.

Supports multiple timeframes and date range filtering.
Data is sourced from Parquet files in data/lake/.

Cache-Control headers vary by timeframe:
- 1m-5m: max-age=30 (30 seconds)
- 15m-4h: max-age=300 (5 minutes)
- 1d-1w: max-age=3600 (1 hour)

Freshness headers:
- X-Data-Stale: true/false
- X-Data-Last-Update: date of most recent candle
- X-Data-Days-Old: age in days
- X-Data-Freshness: ISO timestamp of most recent candle (IST, +05:30)
- X-Data-Type: historical

Get historical OHLCV candles from live brokers via multi-broker architecture.

Uses MarketDataComposer to:
- Route to optimal broker based on policy
- Fetch with quota management
- Merge data from multiple brokers if needed
- Include full provenance audit trail

This endpoint fetches REAL-TIME data from brokers (not cached).
Use /candles for cached datalake data.

Get latest quote/LTP snapshot for a symbol via domain objects.

Cache-Control: max-age=10 (10 seconds) - quotes change frequently.

Fetch market or instrument news from the active broker.

Requires a broker with news support (currently Upstox only).

Get option chain for an underlying from historical OHLCV data.

Returns CE/PE contracts with OI, volume, and LTP. Reads directly from
option parquet files.

Note:
    bid/ask fields are always None because they require live market depth
    (Level 2 order book) data, which is not available in historical OHLCV
    parquet files. OHLCV data only contains aggregated candle information
    (open, high, low, close, volume) per time period, not the order book
    snapshots needed to derive bid/ask quotations.

    For live bid/ask data, use a broker WebSocket feed (Dhan/Upstox) that
    provides real-time market depth.

Get IV surface for 3D visualization.

Returns IV by strike and expiry for surface plot.

Get max pain level for an underlying.

Queries v_max_pain view for strike with maximum option writer profit.

Get Put-Call Ratio (OI and Volume based).

Queries v_pcr view for PCR metrics.
Get options volume profile by strike.

schema.title: Response Get Options Volume Profile Api V1 Options Volume Profile  Underlying  Get

get.description: Get order history from OMS.

post.description:
Place a new order via process ExecutionComposer + OMS spine.

Path: API → live authority gate → ExecutionComposer → OMS → broker.
Broker is resolved from server ``TRADEX_PRIMARY_BROKER`` / trading config
(not from client input). Uses the process session wired at startup (ADR-0020).

Idempotency: supply ``correlation_id`` in the body or ``X-Idempotency-Key`` header.

get.description:
Get trade/executed order history.

Returns filled trades with execution price, quantity, and brokerage.
Uses real OMS trade history from processed trade repository.

Get complete tradebook with P&L analysis.

P&L is sourced from the single PositionManager (the authoritative book
that fills update), NOT recomputed per-request from a divergent source.

schema.title: Response Get Tradebook Api V1 Orders Trades Tradebook Get

delete.description:
Cancel a pending order via ExecutionComposer.

404 is checked via OMS lookup; cancellation routes directly through the
composer (single OMS spine inside ExecutionComposer).

get.description: Get specific order details from OMS.

put.description:
Modify an existing order via ExecutionComposer.

404 is checked via OMS lookup; mutation routes directly through the composer
(single OMS spine inside ExecutionComposer).

get.description:
Get current holdings/portfolio.

Returns long-term holdings with cost basis and current value.
Uses real PositionManager data, filtering for delivery positions.

Get historical P&L curve.

Returns daily/weekly/monthly P&L for equity curve visualization.
Uses trade journal closed trades, with PositionManager fallback.

schema.title: Response Get Pnl History Api V1 Portfolio Pnl Get

get.description:
Get current positions from OMS.

Returns open and closed positions from broker or paper trading.

post.description:
Square off all or specific positions.

Closes all open positions or specific symbol position.
Routes through OMS for risk checks and event publishing.

schema.title: Response Square Off Positions Api V1 Portfolio Square Off Post

get.description:
Get portfolio summary with key metrics.

Returns total value, P&L, margin usage, and risk metrics.
Uses real PositionManager and RiskManager data.
List all replay sessions (active and historical).

schema.title: Response List Sessions Api V1 Replay Sessions Get

post.description:
Create a new replay session.

Initializes replay engine and returns session handle.

get.description: Get replay session details.

post.description:
Start/resume replay playback.

Begins streaming historical market data at the configured speed
through the same FeaturePipeline + StrategyPipeline used in live trading.

Seek to a specific timestamp in the replay.

Calculates progress as a percentage of the session date range.
Falls back to a simple progress estimate if date range is unknown.
Stop replay playback and clean up.

Toggle the kill switch.

When active, all orders will be rejected by the risk manager.

schema.title: Response Toggle Kill Switch Api V1 Risk Kill Switch Post

get.description:
Get current risk management state.

Returns kill switch status, daily PnL, and risk limits.

schema.title: Response Get Risk State Api V1 Risk State Get

get.description:
Get historical scanner results from scan store.

Returns completed scan results with candidates and metrics.
Uses real DuckDB scan_store for persistence.

schema.title: Response Get Scan Results Api V1 Scanner Results Get

post.description:
Trigger a new scanner run.

Executes ScannerRunner.run_all() for the specified scanner
and universe. Returns scan ID for result retrieval.
Uses real ScannerRunner with scanner implementations.

schema.title: Response Run Scan Api V1 Scanner Run Post

get.description:
Get full intraday scanner snapshots.

Returns v_intraday_snapshot for all active symbols.

Get top scanner candidates.

Delegates to analytics endpoint for v_top3/v_top10.

Get strategy candidates.

Returns v_strategy_candidates with combined scanner + features.

Get strategy signals.

Queries DuckDB strategy views:
- halftrend: v_strategy_halftrend
- momentum: v_strategy_momentum
- breakout: v_strategy_breakout

Search symbols by name or symbol code.

Searches across symbol code, company name, and ISIN.
Returns matching symbols with metadata.

Get symbols in a universe (NIFTY50, NIFTY100, NIFTY200, NIFTY500, BANKNIFTY, FINNIFTY).

Reads from static universe files in data/universes/.

Get full metadata for a symbol.

Returns complete instrument information including
lot size, tick size, sector, and data availability.
